title: Intelligent AI Layer
description: Make AI proactive, context-aware, and cross-domain. Move from reactive chatbot to predictive coach.

title: Cross-Domain Connections
description: Link goals to habits to todos to health to finances. Break feature silos.

title: Advanced Input & Analysis
description: Voice journaling, emotion analysis, spaced repetition — richer data capture and smarter processing.

title: Visualization & Insights
description: Life balance radar, mood analytics, heatmaps, trend sparklines — make data beautiful and actionable.

title: Quality & DX
description: Quality gates, CI hardening, portable hooks, code splitting, developer experience.
